holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: JOUL is an equity ETF with a total of 21 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Vernova stock at 13.00%, Eaton Corporation at 12.08%, nVent Electric at 5.68%, Forgent Power Solutions at 5.67%, and Quanta Services at 5.66%.

overview.description: The Corgi High Voltage Grid Equipment ETF (JOUL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. JOULseeks capital appreciation through a portfolio of companies tied tomanufacturing, engineering, and servicing equipment and technologies usedinhigh voltage networks. JOUL was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
